name: @tomehq/theme
description: Tome default theme and React app shell

scripts.build: tsup src/index.tsx src/entry.tsx --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external 'virtual:tome/config' --external 'virtual:tome/routes' --external 'virtual:tome/page-loader' --external 'virtual:tome/doc-context' --external 'virtual:tome/overrides' --external '@tomehq/components'
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.tsx src/entry.tsx --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external 'virtual:tome/config' --external 'virtual:tome/routes' --external 'virtual:tome/page-loader' --external 'virtual:tome/doc-context' --external '@tomehq/components' --watch
